config.name: cisco_duo-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: cisco_duo-latest
-- OCSF Class: Authentication (3002)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:02:16.653157

-- Pre-declare locals for performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_format = string.format
local table_insert = table.insert

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_record(record)
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return false, "Invalid input record"
    end
    if not record.unmapped then
        return false, "Missing unmapped data"
    end
    return true
end

local function validate_field(record, field_path)
    local value = record
    for segment in field_path:gmatch("[^.]+") do
        if type(value) ~= "table" then return nil end
        value = value[segment]
    end
    return value
end

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    local valid, err = validate_record(record)
    if not valid then
        return nil, err
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output structure with local references
    local output = {
        -- Core OCSF fields
        class_uid = 3002,
        class_name = "Authentication",
        category_uid = 3, 
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        activity_id = 1,
        activity_name = "Logon",
        type_uid = 300201,
        
        -- Initialize nested structures
        user = {},
        src_endpoint = {
            location = {}
        }
    }

    -- Local reference to unmapped data for performance
    local unmapped = record.unmapped
    
    -- Efficient field copying with validation
    local function safe_copy(src_path, dest_path)
        local value = validate_field(record, src_path)
        if value then
            local dest = output
            local segments = {}
            for segment in dest_path:gmatch("[^.]+") do
                table_insert(segments, segment)
            end
            
            for i=1, #segments-1 do
                if not dest[segments[i]] then
                    dest[segments[i]] = {}
                end
                dest = dest[segments[i]]
            end
            dest[segments[#segments]] = value
        end
    end

    -- Optimized field mappings
    safe_copy("unmapped.user.name", "user.name")
    safe_copy("unmapped.user.account_uid", "user.account_uid") 
    safe_copy("unmapped.user.account_type", "user.account_type")
    safe_copy("unmapped.src_endpoint.ip", "src_endpoint.ip")
    safe_copy("unmapped.src_endpoint.location.desc", "src_endpoint.location.desc")
    safe_copy("unmapped.src_endpoint.location.city", "src_endpoint.location.city")
    safe_copy("unmapped.src_endpoint.location.country", "src_endpoint.location.country")
    
    -- Copy authentication specific fields
    safe_copy("unmapped.auth_protocol", "auth_protocol")
    safe_copy("unmapped.auth_protocol_id", "auth_protocol_id")
    safe_copy("unmapped.mfa_factors", "mfa_factors")
    safe_copy("unmapped.status", "status")
    safe_copy("unmapped.message", "message")

    -- Handle timestamp
    local timestamp = validate_field(record, "unmapped.timestamp") or 
                     validate_field(record, "unmapped.time")
    output.time = timestamp or (os_time() * 1000)

    -- Validation of required fields
    if not output.user.name or not output.src_endpoint.ip then
        return nil, "Missing required fields: user.name or src_endpoint.ip"
    end

    -- Status normalization
    if output.status then
        output.status = string.upper(output.status)
    end

    return output
end
